task_scores.task_title: Replace prototype make_session_for_arc with generate_session_for_welder; add tuning guide
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Prototype validates a different path than seed, causing demo scores that prototype never saw.
task_scores.reasoning: Directly fixes P1: prototype validates production path; tuning guide gives implementer actionable remediation; full code in plan.

task_scores.task_title: Fix seed_demo_data spot-check: session_ids[0] + first archetype; run in skip and re-seed
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Wrong spot-check ID or branch coverage can let corrupt or partial data pass as complete.
task_scores.reasoning: P3 fix: hardcoded sess_mike-chen_001 passes when archetypes change; session_ids[0] + WELDER_ARCHETYPES[0] aligns.

task_scores.task_title: Idempotent only on existing == expected_count; partial seed triggers re-seed
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: 44/45 sessions could be skipped as complete, leaving demo with stale or inconsistent data.
task_scores.reasoning: P3 fix: 44/45 must re-seed; strict existing == expected_count prevents silent skip of partial data.

task_scores.task_title: Skeleton cards during load; setWelderScores once after Promise.allSettled
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Empty 'Score unavailable' flash for 1-4s makes product look broken; multiple setState causes flicker.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Could defer to batch score endpoint later; for 9h plan, skeleton is fastest fix.
task_scores.reasoning: P4 fix: 20 fetches take time; skeleton + single setState is visible within 48h and reversible.

task_scores.task_title: Use sc.total for last slot in historicalScores (welder report)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Last slot 0 causes fast_learner to show declining when current score is higher; wrong narrative.
task_scores.reasoning: P5 fix: subtle bug with high demo impact; explicit histScores + sc.total for last index; verifiable in Step 4.4.

task_scores.task_title: Add last-slot tests to ai-feedback.test.ts; update plan Step 5.3
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Regression: last-slot 0 fix gets reverted and fast_learner wrongly shows declining.
task_scores.reasoning: P5 fix: test documents caller contract; prevents last-slot regression; full test code in plan.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 3 pre-flight: WELDERS vs WELDER_ARCHETYPES; Tuple; fold 2.3; badge flicker doc
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: WELDERS drift causes 404 at demo; Tuple/fold/badge are low-risk doc/compat fixes.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Pre-flight could be automated; for 9h plan, 2-min manual check suffices.
task_scores.reasoning: P2 + minor: pre-flight prevents 404; Tuple/fold/badge are polish; all reversible.

critical_issues: Step 1.1 and 2.1 depend on parent Phase 1 (generate_session_for_welder) and parent Step 2.4 (seed loops WELDER_ARCHETYPES) — if run before parent is done, all critical work is blocked
session_ids is derived from seed order; plan assumes session_ids[0] aligns with WELDER_ARCHETYPES[0] without verifying seed iteration order matches archetype order
minor_issues: Step 1.2 references plan-10-mock-welders-refined.md which may not exist
Badge flicker dead zone (±2) is optional; adds product decision not documented
suggestions: Add assertion in Step 2.1 that session_ids are built in WELDER_ARCHETYPES order so session_ids[0] is first archetype's first session
Consider Phase 3 pre-flight in CI or pre-deploy to enforce WELDERS/WELDER_ARCHETYPES sync
dependency_order: T1 after parent Phase 1. T2-T3 after parent Step 2.4. T4-T5 after parent Steps 3.1-3.2 and 4.3-4.4. T6 any time. T7 independent doc/compat.
premortem_top_risk: Parent plan Phase 1 is not complete when critique plan starts — implementer runs this plan first and Step 1.1/2.1 block until generate_session_for_welder exists.
goal_alignment_notes: The six critical steps directly support deterministic guidance and regression safety for the 10 Mock Welders demo. Prototype validation, spot-check, idempotency, loading state, last-slot fix, and tests prevent the failures from the critique. Non-critical steps add robustness. 9h estimate is tight but achievable if parent is done.
